interesting_band.interpretation: altered-but-coherent band found: drift elevated while local coherence held

beta_vs_temperature_control.reason: missing one of the two arms

metric_notes.local_coherence: clean-model perplexity-derived; higher = more grammatical/local well-formedness
metric_notes.associative_drift: 1 - cos(prompt, output) under clean model; higher = wanders further
metric_notes.global_coherence: mean consecutive-sentence cosine similarity; LOW = floaty/disconnected
metric_notes.signature: psychedelic-analog = drift/diversity up + local_coherence held + global_coherence down
